channel.title: General-Availability on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in General-Availability on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Mock runs for Azure Storage Actions – Validate before you execute
item.description:
Azure Storage Actions now supports mock runs in general availability. This lets users simulate task execution at full scale before making any changes to Azure Blob or Data Lake Storage.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Auto activation for SaaS subscriptions in Microsoft Marketplace
item.description:
Auto activation for SaaS subscriptions is now generally available in Microsoft Marketplace. When enabled, the subscription and billing cycle start as soon as the purchase flow is completed.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Front Door WebSocket
item.description:
Azure Front Door Standard and Premium now support WebSocket in general availability. The feature is enabled by default and does not require additional configuration.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot Spaces API now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Spaces API is now generally available. It supports programmatic create, read, update, and delete operations for Spaces from external applications.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions now generally available on mobile, web, and VS Code
item.description:
Remote control for Copilot CLI sessions is now generally available on GitHub Mobile and github.com, with support also referenced for VS Code. It lets you start work in the terminal and continue managing the session from mobile or web.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Managed Identity Support for Azure Files SMB Is now GA
item.description:
Azure Files SMB now supports Managed Identities in general availability. Applications and services can authenticate to Azure Files without storing static credentials or account keys, using Entra-issued tokens instead.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Code-to-cloud risk visibility with Microsoft Defender for Cloud is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub says the code-to-cloud risk visibility integration with Microsoft Defender for Cloud is now generally available. The release includes follow-up improvements since public preview, bringing artifact and runtime context closer together.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS
item.description:
Prefix-scoped access for User Delegation SAS in Azure Blob Storage is now generally available in all Azure regions. It adds a scope between container-level and single-blob access for SAS tokens.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: GPT-5.5 is generally available for GitHub Copilot
item.description:
GPT-5.5 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed the model performs best on complex, multi-step agentic coding tasks and real-world problem solving.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files advanced ransomware protection
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files advanced ransomware protection (ANF ARP) is now generally available. It is intended to help detect, respond to, and recover from ransomware threats on cloud volumes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Claude Opus 4.7 is generally available
item.description:
Claude Opus 4.7 is now generally available in GitHub Copilot. GitHub says early testing showed improved multi-step task performance and more reliable agentic execution.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: PgBouncer 1.25.1 support in Azure Database for PostgreSQL – Flexible Server
item.description:
PgBouncer 1.25.1 is now generally available in Azure Database for PostgreSQL – Flexible Server. It is offered as a built-in connection pooling feature to help manage idle and short-lived connections with low overhead.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Disable HTTP proxy in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service now supports disabling HTTP proxy settings in an existing cluster. This helps administrators remove or change proxy configuration as network requirements evolve without needing disruptive cluster changes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions now supports MCP resource triggers
item.description:
Azure Functions now generally supports MCP resource triggers for MCP servers hosted on Functions. This lets developers expose resources directly, in addition to tools.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot organization custom instructions are generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot organization custom instructions are now generally available. Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise org admins can set default instructions for their organization.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Codespaces is now generally available for GitHub Enterprise with data residency
item.description:
GitHub Codespaces is now generally available for GitHub Enterprise Cloud with data residency. Enterprises can use cloud development environments with configurable security while keeping data residency requirements in place.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Event Grid provides new capabilities for smarter, more secure event-driven architectures
item.description:
Azure Event Grid has added several generally available capabilities to improve event-driven system management, interoperability, and control. The announced GA feature shown in the provided content is MQTT Message Ordering, which preserves in-order delivery of MQTT messages.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Premium SSD v2 Disk is now available in South India
item.description:
Azure Premium SSD v2 is now generally available in South India. The region does not have Availability Zones, and the disk type provides sub-millisecond latency as a next-generation general-purpose block storage option for Azure VMs.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Cosmos DB Mirroring in Microsoft Fabric with private endpoints
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB Mirroring in Microsoft Fabric now supports private endpoints and is generally available. This lets you run analytics on operational data while keeping network traffic private.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Container network metrics filtering for AKS
item.description:
Azure Container Networking Services (ACNS) for AKS now supports container network metrics filtering in general availability. This lets operators reduce metric volume and focus on operationally relevant data.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Container network logs in AKS
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) container network logs are now generally available. The feature adds visibility into pod/network traffic to help diagnose Kubernetes networking issues and failures.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Hierarchy view in GitHub Projects is now generally available
item.description:
Hierarchy view in GitHub Projects is now generally available. It is enabled by default for all new project views, and existing views can be updated to use it.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is generally available. The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, with an improved merge experience among the highlighted changes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Databricks update workspace network configuration
item.description:
Azure Databricks now generally supports updating an existing workspace’s network configuration.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Red Hat OpenShift is now available in Malaysia West, New Zealand North, and Mexico Central
item.description:
Azure Red Hat OpenShift (ARO) is now generally available in three additional Azure regions: Malaysia West, New Zealand North, and Mexico Central.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Copilot metrics is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot usage metrics are now generally available, providing a centralized view of team adoption and usage.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise AI Controls & agent control plane now generally available
item.description:
GitHub announced general availability of Enterprise AI Controls and the agent control plane for GitHub Enterprise administrators.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise-defined custom organization roles are generally available
item.description:
GitHub now generally makes available enterprise-defined custom organization roles to help enterprises standardize role-based access across multiple organizations.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Premium SSD v2 Disk is now available in Brazil Southeast, and in a third Availability Zone in Malaysia West and Indonesia Central
item.description:
Azure Premium SSD v2 disks are now generally available in Brazil Southeast and expanded to a third Availability Zone in Malaysia West and Indonesia Central.

  • Source: Azure Updates
